holdings.infoBox: FEOE is an equity ETF with a total of 86 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 5.85%, Shell at 3.89%, British American Tobacco p.l.c. at 3.77%, Imperial Oil at 2.98%, and LVMH Moët Hennessy - Louis Vuitton, Société Européenne at 2.92%.

overview.description: The First Eagle Overseas Equity ETF (FEOE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, primarily investing in equities of non-US companies. Utilizing a value investment approach, it seeks firms with a margin of safety, prioritizing those trading below intrinsic value to mitigate risks FEOE was launched on Dec 19, 2024 and is issued by First Eagle.
